title: pelargonium × lambertii
intro: Pelargonium × lambertii, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus. This plant is valued for its fragrant, rose-like flowers and its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relieving anxiety, stress, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
